title: BEM-644 dispatch repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Re-queue operational proof workflows in a deterministic state. This avoids relying on stale queued files from failed post-hook attempts.
entries=[
  {'queue_id':'bem644_run_curator_hourly_report','workflow':'curator-hourly-report.yml','reason':'Verify canonical hourly report delivery through workflow_dispatch after dispatch permissions repair.','status':'queued','created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'},
  {'queue_id':'bem644_run_direct_telegram_smoke','workflow':'telegram-direct-delivery-smoke.yml','reason':'Verify Telegram delivery channel directly through workflow_dispatch after dispatch permissions repair.','status':'queued','created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'},
  {'queue_id':'bem644_run_claude_runtime_smoke','workflow':'claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml','reason':'Verify Claude primary runtime availability through workflow_dispatch after dispatch permissions repair.','status':'queued','created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'}
]
for e in entries:
    (queue/(e['queue_id']+'.json')).write_text(json.dumps(e,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

# Static validation of files required for queue runner. Do not perform network dispatch inside Python executor.
files={
 'codex_runner':'.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml',
 'dispatch_runner_workflow':'.github/workflows/workflow-dispatch-queue-runner.yml',
 'dispatch_runner_script':'scripts/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.py',
 'curator_hourly_workflow':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
 'telegram_smoke_workflow':'.github/workflows/telegram-direct-delivery-smoke.yml',
 'claude_smoke_workflow':'.github/workflows/claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml'
}
checks=[]
for name,path in files.items():
    p=Path(path)
    text=p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
    checks.append({'name':name+'_exists','pass':p.exists(),'path':path})
    if path.endswith('.yml'):
        checks.append({'name':name+'_has_workflow_dispatch','pass':'workflow_dispatch:' in text,'path':path})
        checks.append({'name':name+'_no_forbidden_secrets_github_token','pass':'secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN' not in text,'path':path})
    if name in ['codex_runner','dispatch_runner_workflow']:
        checks.append({'name':name+'_has_actions_write','pass':'actions: write' in text,'path':path})
    if name=='codex_runner':
        checks.append({'name':'codex_runner_has_dispatch_queue_hook','pass':'Run workflow dispatch queue if present' in text,'path':path})
script_text=Path(files['dispatch_runner_script']).read_text(errors='ignore') if Path(files['dispatch_runner_script']).exists() else ''
checks.append({'name':'dispatch_runner_uses_github_api','pass':'/actions/workflows/' in script_text and '/dispatches' in script_text,'path':files['dispatch_runner_script']})
checks.append({'name':'dispatch_runner_uses_pat_env','pass':'GH_DISPATCH_TOKEN' in script_text,'path':files['dispatch_runner_script']})
all_pass=all(x['pass'] for x in checks)
blocker=None if all_pass else {'code':'DISPATCH_QUEUE_STATIC_VALIDATION_FAILED','failed':[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]}
status='queued_ready_for_codex_runner_hook' if all_pass else 'queued_but_static_validation_failed'

protocol=protocols/'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE_REPAIR_BEM644.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-644 | Workflow Dispatch Queue Runtime Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Operational proof workflows are re-queued after token/permission fixes. Dispatch must happen via workflow_dispatch hook, not push cascade.'+sep+sep+'Queued workflows:'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+e['workflow'] for e in entries])+sep)
state={'schema_version':'dispatch_queue_runtime_repair.v1','bem':'BEM-644','status':status,'queued':[e['queue_id'] for e in entries],'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem644_dispatch_queue_runtime_repair.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem644_dispatch_queue_runtime_repair.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-644 | Dispatch Queue Runtime Repair | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Queued'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+e['queue_id']+' → '+e['workflow'] for e in entries])+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem644_dispatch_queue_runtime_repair','cycle_id':'bem644-dispatch-queue-runtime-repair','source':'gpt_executor','status':status,'queued':[e['queue_id'] for e in entries],'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem644_dispatch_queue_runtime_repair']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'queued':[e['queue_id'] for e in entries],'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['workflow_dispatch_queue']='requeued_ready_for_hook' if all_pass else 'requeued_static_validation_failed'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:56 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem644_dispatch_queue_runtime_repair.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-644: status='+status+' queued='+str(len(entries))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+[str(queue/(e['queue_id']+'.json')) for e in entries])
ops_applied.append('Re-queued operational proof workflows and statically validated dispatch queue infrastructure after token/permission repair')
"""
No issue comments.
